reviews.author: Nicha Komen (G)
reviews.text: This apartment is quite cheap compared with other places. All bills are included. There is a big living room and separated spaces in the common areas. The staff are so friendly. I am satisfied with my stay here

reviews.author: VeeSweetpea
reviews.text: Our apartment worked for our family stay. Having an onsite laundry was definitely helpful. Veiw from our room was nice. Don't expect to see your security deposit back any time soon after leaving. We are still waiting. They said they've refunded it the day we left yet we've seen nothing. Edit to add, they took $80 for l

reviews.author: Md. Sifat Morshed
reviews.text: The place is very close to UoA is very convenient for students. Everything is included in rent except laundry so that's a good deal. The place is located in a hilly area so whenever you are gonna go out you have to climb the uphill. Keep it in mind. One disadvantage is the washroom and shower is too small.

reviews.author: Stephen Li
reviews.text: I have had a very pleasant living experience at Student Living Auckland. The rooms are comfortable and well-maintained, and the street-facing units have great natural sunlight, which I really enjoy. The staff are always friendly, patient, and very supportive. They respond to emails promptly and are willing to help with

reviews.author: Amy Amy
reviews.text: I had a great experience staying in this apartment. The facilities are excellent, well maintained, and very convenient for daily living. Everything works properly and the environment is clean and comfortable. The staff are especially impressive—very warm, friendly, and helpful. They assisted me with many issues and alw

reviews.author: Phi Hà Hoàng
reviews.text: Great student living option! Located just 15 minutes from school (AUT, Uoa), this place ticks all the boxes. My room faces the courtyard, making it super chill and relaxing. The place has character and gets plenty of natural light. It's an older building, but everything works fine and it's functional. Would definitely

reviews.author: Meena K.
reviews.text: Overall, living here as a student studying in the city centre is perfect. It's easy to reach supermarkets, Asian shops, and public transportation, and you can walk to buy the necessary things and groceries. It doesn't have a perfect building, but if you compare it with another place near the city centre, I think this p

reviews.author: ALICE f
reviews.text: This is my dream accommodation! This place is really clean!! And people are really kind! I have good memories here! Thanks Anna, my pretty receptionist friend! And there are lots of good RA here!!

reviews.author: muhammad al-amir
reviews.text: I’ve been living at UniLodge for a while now and honestly, it’s been such a great experience. The staff are always really friendly and approachable—nothing ever feels like too much trouble. The building itself is clean and secure, and everything’s well looked after. I’ve met some awesome people here too, which has made

reviews.author: Chau Long Pham Thai
reviews.text: I am having a delightful experience staying in UniLodge Stafford House, particularly in the room with a serene view overlooking The Terrace. The room is equipped with a large table, perfect for students in need of a dedicated workspace. The staff are not only hospitable but also incredibly supportive. I was impressed b

reviews.author: Legacy (Cowlegacy)
reviews.text: Don't live here, there was mold in the dishwasher before I moved in. The mattress was literally ripped in multiple places. The door handle fell of our door and it wasn't fixed for months. The RA assigned left and we had no communication. There was a floor to ceiling 1cm wide gap between mine and my flatmates room. The

reviews.author: Ayse Kekec
reviews.text: I’ve been staying at Stafford for around 2 weeks now and I love it. The room was fully furnished, kitchen already had supplies and the bathroom clean with no signs of mould but was spotless! Love that we have security as well throughout the night which gives the comfort of safety! Comes with a gym and also the easy acc

reviews.author: Sakii K
reviews.text: Great place to stay for university students; safe, friendly, and full of creative spaces. I stayed at UniLodge Mayoral Drive (MDSA) during my first year at AUT, and honestly, I had a great experience. The security was solid, which gave me real peace of mind. Only residents with access cards could enter, so I never had

reviews.author: Shireen Singh
reviews.text: If you are someone who likes their own space as in their own washroom and kitchen space then Unilodge is the best place. It’s so close to university and other ammenities. There are so many activities organised which are always worth the money. It is a clean and comfortable room. The unilodge staffs are also very friend

reviews.author: Mahsa Zamani Boroujeni
reviews.text: when I called them, the funniest thing I have ever heard in my life was that if you are a student you can live here but your husband cannot live with you because he is not a student. I haven’t seen it in any part of the world. So if you want to live far from your husband or wife it is really a good place. If I could gi

reviews.author: Timson Maethara
reviews.text: I’m having a great experience here. Firstly, the staff are very kind and welcoming. As an international student, adapting to a new environment can sometimes be challenging, so I truly appreciate the support provided here. I would especially like to appreciate the night manager, Mr. Andrew Snowden, for his great efforts

reviews.author: Lex Patterson
reviews.text: The building itself is old but has fun activities to do. Outside is a courtyard area with a volleyball court and basketball hoop. The first level has a pool table and tables to play cards at. Almost every week a different event is run where you can meet new people and eat free food. The apartments themselves are outfit

reviews.author: Haorui Ding
reviews.text: This apartment has a beautiful environment, is very quiet, and has convenient transportation. It is close to supermarkets, banks, schools, and bus stops. The staff has a good attitude and solves problems quickly. I will recommend this apartment to others

reviews.author: Didi
reviews.text: The staff here are very welcoming. Except for one of the staff she has a very bad attitude for no reason. I have seen her roll her eyes at me and is always on her phone everytime a person is at Reception. You dare interrupt her from doing something she shouldn’t be doing on her job and you will get the cold glare. Like

reviews.author: Shien
reviews.text: Unilodge Beach Road reception staff are helpful & awesome especially Manisha! Thanks for being so attentive & kind to me. I had a wonderful stay at Unilodge. The location is great, near to bus stop, groceries & in CBD. Highly recommended to international students!

reviews.author: Ruth Fernandes
reviews.text: I love this accommodation! Best place I’ve stayed at! Everyone is so supportive and kind I definitely recommend :)
